title: Cozy Candi Tandoori
description: A savory and juicy Indian dish featuring candied peel in a cozy whole30-friendly recipe cooked in the tandoor oven.
instructions: Heat a tandoor or oven-safe Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add oil and cook ginger, chilli powder, and cumin seeds until fragrant.
Add boneless chicken breasts to the pan and coat them with tandoori sauce. Cook for about 10 minutes on each side, basting occasionally with reserved marinade.
Remove chicken from pan and set aside. In the same pan, add sliced candied citrus peel, tossing well until coated evenly with residual oil and spices.
Return chicken to the pan and let it cook for another 5-7 minutes or until chicken reaches your desired doneness.
Serve hot as a cozy meal.
